name: nero-party
description: Real-time listening parties with iTunes preview search, shared queues, live cheering, and a final crown reveal.

scripts.dev: npm run dev --workspace @nero/server & npm run dev --workspace @nero/web
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @nero/server && npm run build --workspace @nero/web
scripts.e2e:db:reset: cd apps/server && rm -f prisma/e2e.db && sqlite3 prisma/e2e.db < prisma/migrations/20260615000000_init/migration.sql
scripts.e2e:serve:api: npm run e2e:db:reset && cd apps/server && DATABASE_URL=file:./e2e.db PORT=4100 WEB_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:5174 tsx src/main.ts
